changeSet.author: fix
changeSet.comment: Stat types were in Russian (СИЛ, ЛОВ...) but all service code uses English names. Migration 030 seed JOINs on English names and found 0 matches.

changeSet.author: fix
changeSet.comment: Classes were in Russian but CharacterWizardService switch statements use English. Migration 030 UPDATEs matched 0 rows. Also adds 4 missing SRD classes.

changeSet.author: fix
changeSet.comment: Seed 009 referenced stat_types WHERE name='STR' but names were Russian. Blessed and Weakened got NULL target_stat_id.

changeSet.author: fix
changeSet.comment: Migration 030-01 tried to seed 18 skills but JOIN on English stat names found 0 rows because stat_types were Russian. Table is empty.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), v.name, st.id FROM (VALUES ('Athletics', 'Strength'), ('Acrobatics', 'Dexterity'), ('Sleight of Hand', 'Dexterity'), ('Stealth', 'Dexterity'), ('Arcana', 'Intelligence'), ('History', 'Intelligence'), ('Investigation', 'Intelligence'), ('Nature', 'Intelligence'), ('Religion', 'Intelligence'), ('Animal Handling', 'Wisdom'), ('Insight', 'Wisdom'), ('Medicine', 'Wisdom'), ('Perception', 'Wisdom'), ('Survival', 'Wisdom'), ('Deception', 'Charisma'), ('Intimidation', 'Charisma'), ('Performance', 'Charisma'), ('Persuasion', 'Charisma') ) AS v(name, stat_name) JOIN stat_types st ON st.name = v.stat_name WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills ps WHERE ps.name = v.name);

changeSet.author: fix
changeSet.comment: Migration 030-03 tried to UPDATE classes by English name but names were Russian. Now classes are English, re-apply all metadata including 4 new classes.

changeSet.author: fix
changeSet.comment: Migration 030-04 built class ID JSON using English class names but classes were Russian. All spells got NULL available_to_class_ids_json. Now rebuild from correct names.
changeSet.sql: WITH spell_class_map(spell_name, classes) AS (VALUES ('Fire Bolt', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Sacred Flame', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Eldritch Blast', ARRAY['Warlock']), ('Mage Hand', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Light', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Minor Illusion', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Prestidigitation',ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Ray of Frost', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Thaumaturgy', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Druidcraft', ARRAY['Druid']), ('Vicious Mockery', ARRAY['Bard']), ('Guidance', ARRAY['Cleric','Druid']), ('Resistance', ARRAY['Cleric','Druid']), ('Spare the Dying', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Chill Touch', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Poison Spray', ARRAY['Druid','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Produce Flame', ARRAY['Druid']), ('Shillelagh', ARRAY['Druid']), ('Blade Ward', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('True Strike', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Magic Missile', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Shield', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Cure Wounds', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid','Paladin','Ranger']), ('Healing Word', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid']), ('Bless', ARRAY['Cleric','Paladin']), ('Thunderwave', ARRAY['Bard','Druid','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Detect Magic', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid','Paladin','Ranger','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Mage Armor', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Sleep', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Faerie Fire', ARRAY['Bard','Druid']), ('Guiding Bolt', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Hex', ARRAY['Warlock']), ('Hunter''s Mark', ARRAY['Ranger']), ('Burning Hands', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Charm Person', ARRAY['Bard','Druid','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Entangle', ARRAY['Druid']), ('Inflict Wounds', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Witch Bolt', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Command', ARRAY['Cleric','Paladin']), ('Sanctuary', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Spiritual Weapon',ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Hold Person', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Misty Step', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Scorching Ray', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Lesser Restoration', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid','Paladin','Ranger']), ('Shatter', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Web', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Invisibility', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Darkness', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Mirror Image', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Fireball', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Counterspell', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Revivify', ARRAY['Cleric','Paladin']), ('Spirit Guardians',ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Dispel Magic', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid','Paladin','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Lightning Bolt', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Fly', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Haste', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Greater Invisibility', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Banishment', ARRAY['Cleric','Paladin','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Dimension Door', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Polymorph', ARRAY['Bard','Druid','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Wall of Fire', ARRAY['Druid','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Mass Cure Wounds',ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid']), ('Raise Dead', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Paladin']), ('Cone of Cold', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Hold Monster', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']) ) UPDATE spells s SET available_to_class_ids_json = ( SELECT '["' || string_agg(cc.id::text, '","') || '"]' FROM character_classes cc WHERE cc.name = ANY(m.classes) ) FROM spell_class_map m WHERE s.name = m.spell_name;
